examples: The time is 9 o'clock and this is Marian Snow with the news.
Father Mushtaq Pyara expressed concern as devotees prepare for the 62nd pilgrimage to the National Marian Shrine in Mariamabad.
Marian teased George about his big glasses.
Marian Mahoney, governor of HMP Moorland, said the riots had a "profound effect" on the prison.
Marian Gaborik landed in Columbus, providing the trade-happy Blue Jackets' playoff push a nudge.
